function.mainExpr:
(?x) # use inline comments ^ ( ( (global|member)\s+ \b(?!_MG)\b [\w_\.]+ )
| # Or, functions, excepted a selection of some
\s+ ( \b(?!EvalFunc|ExitConditions|navigate|OnEnter|OnExit|Wait)\b [\w_\.]+ ) \s*=\s* ( function\s*\( )
| # Or, specific fixed tables; # for Roles, we exclude the _goals case, where we have an index list
\s+ ( Navigation | Roles\s*=\s*{\s*(?!\s*\[) # Bug: If followed by a comment, not caught... | Switches )
| # Or, trigger table, with the 1st property being its name
\s+[\w_\.]+\s*=\s*{\s*Name\s*\=
| # At last, we catch the goals of a _goals file, # but not the equivalent of InitializeRoutes, # aka MapRoutes table entries (so, single identation) # It has to be followed by the equal caracter then an opening bracket, # else variables/constants would also be caught # Bug: [A-Z]+ catches lower-case chars too before the _...
(\t|[ ]{4})[A-Z0-9]+_\w+\s*=\s*{(?!\s*") )
